prompts.text: Generate a Billing bounded context with one create command, one projection, validation, registration, and tests.
Generate an action queue projection for pending approvals.
Generate a destructive archive command with confirmation-safe fields.
Generate a command protected by a named policy.
Generate a tenant-safe command without tenant/user input fields.
Generate command validation rules and tests.
Generate a Counter-like bounded context following the sample structure.
Generate a projection suitable for MCP Markdown rendering.
Generate command code and tests that respect the two-call lifecycle.
Generate source files while avoiding edits to generated .g.cs output.
Generate bounded-context registration for FrontComposer.
Generate command/projection code that produces SourceTools manifest output.
Generate sample tests for command and projection metadata.
Generate a bounded context using only approved FrontComposer packages.
Generate validation tests for invalid command payloads.
Generate a projection with status badge mappings.
Generate a projection with an empty-state CTA linked to a command.
Generate bounded-context code without direct EventStore calls.
Generate code using framework defaults while leaving team overlays external.
Generate code and notes that would require migration guidance if public examples break.
